text:
Created attachment 256479
Update to 1.0.3, fix ImageMagick, fix for retired port textproc/sgrep

Update port to 1.0.3 
Fix  rc-script issue
ImageMagick: add FALVOR -x11/-nox11, make -x11 default
Fix EoL'ed textproc/sgrep -> use suggested alternative textproc/p5-ack instead
Fix minor issues
